body:
We should allow to easily develop grammars inherited from meta-language, by using grammar inference (find patterns in examples of texts of that grammar).

Ideally it should be possible to reconstruct programming language grammar by using only examples of correct programming language texts.

We also need to make sure we use https://github.com/link-foundation/meta-notation as a basis for our meta-language. And our meta language itself is inherited from meta-notation.

So when constructing new grammars in meta-language ecosystem, it should be possible to have maximum freedom of grammar inference.

Search online best papers on the topic of grammar inference, and we need to have working rust implementation, that is able to generate grammar description in the meta-language itself, which after that we should be able to translate to rust, javascript and other languages (we also should include of PEG, BNF and other languages, to be parsed as meta language).

Note that meta language has shared concepts between all the languages, so if the concept is exactly the same in both of formal or natural languages, it will be possible to translate it 1 to 1 with little code modification or extension.

We need to plan as much issues as possible to make sure our system fully implements everything, beats all the competitors in all metrics.

We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).

You have unlimited time and context, as context auto-compacts and you can continue indefinitely, until everything is totally planned as issues in this repository.

Make sure all issues are sub-issues of this issue, and have properly configured blocked by relationships using gh tool, to make dependencies between issues visible.

Each issue should be maximum detailed possible, so even week AI agent will be able to complete it.
title: Easy grammar extensibility and grammar inference
